news.headline: Co-leader of German SPD party: We do not decide who holds talks about coalition
Hikvision wins EcoVadis Silver Medal for sustainability efforts in China. Award recognizes commitment to responsible practices.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China on February 24, 2025, Hikvision received the EcoVadis Silver Medal, a prestigious accolade from the globally recognized sustainability rating platform. This achievement underscores the company's dedication to sustainable business practices and its noteworthy commitment to responsible operations.

news.headline: WeRide's GXR Robotaxi approved for fully unmanned commercial operations in Beijing, 2nd model released.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, a leading autonomous driving technology company, WeRide (Nasdaq: WRD), received authorization to introduce its newest Robotaxi, the GXR, in Beijing for fully autonomous paid ride-hailing operations. This innovative model becomes WeRide's second Robotaxi offering in the market.

news.headline: Growth of index funds in crypto, provides diversified exposure, reduce risk. Bitwise 10 Crypto Index Fund launched in 2017.
news.summary: Index funds are gaining popularity in the crypto world as they offer investors diversified exposure and help mitigate risks. These funds track baskets of assets rather than a single digital token, reducing concentration risk. The Bitwise 10 Crypto Index Fund was launched in 2017, and Fidelity and Bloomberg introduced the Bloomberg Galaxy Crypto Index in 2018. With the approval of Bitcoin ETFs by the SEC in January 2024, index funds are gaining traction in the market. These funds provide a broader approach to digital asset investing, similar to traditional finance's index-based funds. As institutional adoption of cryptocurrencies grows, multi-token index funds could bridge traditional investment strategies with digital assets, offering investors a way to invest across the broader market and reducing the hassle and risks associated with investing in individual coins.Indexes offer a diversified approach to investing, sparing investors the burden of keeping up with information about numerous digital assets.

news.headline: Prosus is acquiring Just Eat Takeaway for $4.3 billion in cash deal.
Co-leader of German SPD party: It's unclear if SPD will be a part of the future government
SubSplit Services Group acquires Stratus Systems, LLC, a high purity mechanical services firm. Acquisition announced on Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: Memphis, Tennessee - On February 24, 2025, SubSplit Services Group, LP revealed the successful acquisition of Stratus Systems, LLC, a leading mechanical services firm specializing in high purity services. The company's expertise in this area has positioned it as an outstanding player in the industry. The acquisition was noted for its strategic value, with substantial potential for growth. Key figures involved in the deal include Brian, Terrence, and Kevin, who have been instrumental in the success of Stratus Systems, LLC.

news.headline: Trump: Apple has just announced a record investment in the US, thank you Tim Cook and Apple.
Edison Partners sells RapidDeploy to Motorola Solutions, the top provider of next-gen 911 mapping for public safety. No financial terms disclosed.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, growth equity firm Edison Partners revealed the successful exit of its investment in RapidDeploy to Motorola Solutions. RapidDeploy, based in Austin, TX, is a prominent provider of cloud-native next-generation 911 mapping, mobile, and analytics solutions for public safety agencies. The acquisition aims to enhance real-time intelligence for public safety agencies across the United States. The financial details of the transaction were not disclosed. For further information, refer to Motorola Solutions’ official statement.

news.headline: HKBU gains strong backing for new medical school proposal; committees meet to discuss progress on establishment of the initiative.Numbers: 1 Nobel Laureate, multiple field experts, meeting held on Feb. 23.
news.summary: On February 23, 2025, in Hong Kong, the Preparatory Committee and Expert Advisory Committee overseeing the establishment of a new medical school by Hong Kong Baptist University (HKBU) met to discuss the progress. Key details from the meeting included updates on the preparations for the university's upcoming medical school.

news.summary: In Bridgewater, New Jersey on February 24, 2025, Firstsource Solutions Limited, a part of the RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group and listed on the NSE under the symbol FSL and on the BSE as 532809, revealed their latest strategy known as UnBPO™. This initiative marks a significant departure from conventional outsourcing practices as the company focuses on specialization, creativity, and...

news.headline: MPLAB XC Unified Compiler Licenses streamline software management, saving time & costs for innovation.
news.summary: A new unified licensing system has been implemented to streamline processes, saving teams valuable time and resources by allowing them to concentrate on innovating and accelerating product development efforts. This cost-effective solution aims to improve efficiency and drive quicker results.

news.headline: FiscalNote hires John Lee from Palantir to boost AI & Tech solutions for govt efficiencies.
news.summary: FiscalNote, based in Washington, has enlisted John Lee, the former Head of Federal Contracting at Palantir, to enhance their AI and tech solutions for government operations. Lee's expertise will bolster FiscalNote's efforts to provide efficient services to the government sector.

news.headline: Muse Events in Portugal invites global companies for premium events in 2025 with CEO Latasha Jastrzebski.
news.summary: A prominent event management company named Muse Events, headquartered in Lisbon, Portugal, has issued an invitation to international businesses and organizations to consider Portugal as the prime location for top-tier events in the year 2025. The company, led by CEO Latasha Jastrzebski, is promoting the country as an ideal destination for such gatherings.

news.headline: Volaris reports $46 million net income in Q4 2024. Ultra-low-cost carrier serving Mexico, US, and Americas.
news.summary: In Mexico City on February 24, 2025, Controladora Vuela Compañía de Aviación, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VLRS and BMV: VOLAR), known as Volaris, a leading ultra-low-cost carrier in Mexico, the United States, Central and South America, disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Volaris, a prominent ULCC, shared its financial results for the mentioned periods.

news.headline: Ethereum initiates Pectra testing on Holesky today, with new rewards, account abstraction, and layer-2 scaling.
news.summary: Today marks the launch of Ethereum's Pectra upgrade on the Holesky testnet. This upgrade brings new features including validator rewards, account abstraction, and enhancements for layer-2 scaling. The implementation aims to enhance the efficiency and functionality of Ethereum, attracting more users and developers to the network.

news.headline: Kaspi.kz's Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on 28 March 2025 at 10:00 Astana time in Almaty, Kazakhstan.
news.summary: In Almaty, Kazakhstan, on February 24, 2025, the Board of Directors of JSC Kaspi.kz (Nasdaq: KSPI) has disclosed that the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of JSC Kaspi.kz is scheduled for March 28, 2025, at 10:00 Astana time. The meeting will take place at 154 “A”, Nauryzbai Batyr Street, Almaty, Kazakhstan, 050013.

news.headline: BirdseyePost introduces Penny©, an AI agent for automated marketing, aiming for personalized campaigns across print and digital.
news.summary: A company in Toronto, BirdseyePost, has introduced Penny©, an AI-driven agent that can automate direct mail and digital marketing efforts. This technology allows for the creation of personalized campaigns at scale, utilizing data-driven strategies.

news.headline: QuidelOrtho to participate in 46th Raymond James Institutional Investor Conference on March 5, 2025 at 8:40 am ET/5:40 am PT.
news.summary: QuidelOrtho Corporation, a leading provider of in-vitro diagnostic technologies for various medical settings, disclosed that its management team will be involved in the 46th Annual Raymond James Institutional Investor Conference on March 5, 2025. The team members are scheduled for a presentation at 8:40 a.m. ET / 5:40 a.m. PT. QuidelOrtho is listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol QDEL and serves global clientele in point-of-care, clinical labs, and transfusion medicine sectors.

news.headline: Aeva will release Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 19, 2025, followed by a conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT.
news.summary: Aeva®, a company specializing in advanced sensing and perception systems, is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 after the market closes on Wednesday, March 19, 2025. The company, listed under NASDAQ as AEVA, will conduct a conference call and webcast at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day to discuss these results. The event is titled "Aeva Technologies, Inc. Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results."

news.headline: Zero PCF Intermediaries Market to reach $94.3 billion by 2035, with 11.2% CAGR. North America captures 32.7% market share.
news.summary: The Global Zero PCF Intermediaries Market was valued at US$29.2 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach US$94.3 billion by 2035, growing at a rate of 11.2% annually. These intermediaries revolutionize chemical manufacturing by enabling zero-carbon footprint production processes. The market expansion is driven by regulatory pressures, sustainability needs, and consumer demand for eco-friendly products. Significant investment is being made in new production methods incorporating renewable energy and circular economy principles. North America is expected to lead the market growth, capturing 32.7% market share in 2025 with an opportunity of US$20.8 billion. East Asia holds 22.5% market share in 2025, with an opportunity of US$14.2 billion between 2025 and 2035. The sector's growth is propelled by collaborative efforts among chemical companies, technology providers, and end-users to create scalable, sustainable solutions. Innovation in process technologies and green chemistry is key to achieving commercially viable, carbon-neutral intermediates.

news.headline: Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM) to present at Morgan Stanley Conference in SF on March 3, 2025 at 2:35 pm PT. CFO Barry A. Hytinen will speak. Webcast available.
news.summary: In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), known for its information management services worldwide, will engage in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco, CA. The event is scheduled for Monday, March 3, 2025, at 2:35 pm PT (5:35 pm ET). Barry A. Hytinen, Executive Vice President, and Chief Financial Officer will be the presenter. The presentation will be webcast for accessibility on the Investor Relation platform.

news.headline: OXIO appoints Robb Robinson SVP of Sales and Channels to boost U.S. expansion. Robinson brings 27 years of experience.
news.summary: In New York, OXIO, a prominent Telecom-as-a-Service (TaaS) platform, revealed the appointment of Robb Robinson as the new senior vice president of sales and channels. Robinson, a seasoned sales executive with 27 years of experience in the telecom and engineering sectors, will spearhead OXIO’s commercial strategy to boost revenue and foster channel partnerships. The company aims to enhance its provision of next-generation MVNOs and connectivity experiences nationwide.

news.headline: Bruker unveils new proteomics software and applications at US HUPO, enhancing biological insights. Major focus on single-cell proteomics. #BRKR #HUPO.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, Bruker Corporation (Nasdaq: BRKR) unveiled advancements in 4D-Proteomics™ at the 21st Annual US HUPO Conference. The company shared updates on A. AIP on timsTOF Ultra 2, which enhances peptide and protein identification performance for single-cell proteomics and immunopeptidomics. These improvements are still in progress but promise highly efficient ion transfer. This development aims to provide deeper biological insights and enhance the understanding of biological processes.

news.headline: Volato Group starts Bitcoin mining, focusing on aviation-linked crypto mining; plans to hold Bitcoin in Q1 2025.
news.summary: An aviation company, Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR), has initiated Bitcoin mining operations as part of its venture into aviation-integrated cryptocurrency mining. This move marks a notable early step in their exploration. The company anticipates holding Bitcoin on its balance sheet for the first time by Q1 2025. The current mining phase is land-based, enabling Volato to acquire direct knowledge of mining processes as they progress in this endeavor.

news.headline: Unity plans to offer $500.0 million in Convertible Senior Notes due 2030 to qualified institutional buyers.
news.summary: San Francisco-based Unity Software Inc. declared its plan to offer $500.0 million in Convertible Senior Notes due 2030 in a private placement to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. Unity, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol U, is a prominent platform for game and interactive experiences development. The Offering is conditional on market conditions and other factors.

news.headline: Healx begins Phase 2 trial with HLX-1502 for Neurofibromatosis Type 1, 1st patient dosed. NF1 affects 1 in 2,500.
news.summary: In Cambridge, England, Healx, a clinical-stage biotech company focused on rare diseases, shared news that the first patient has received a dose in the INSPIRE-NF1 Phase 2 trial. This trial aims to assess the safety and effectiveness of HLX-1502, an oral experimental treatment, for individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1). NF1 is a rare genetic condition leading to tumor growth along nerves, commonly appearing during childhood. This disorder impacts around one in every 2,500 people.

news.headline: Precision BioSciences to present preclinical data on Duchenne muscular dystrophy treatment at 2025 MDA conference.
news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, Precision BioSciences, Inc., listed as DTIL on Nasdaq, disclosed plans to share preclinical findings from its PBGENE-DMD initiative at the 2025 Muscular Dystrophy Association (MDA) event. The company, known for its innovative ARCUS® platform for gene editing, is focused on in vivo gene editing therapies targeting gene elimination, insertion, and excision. The presentation will tackle the treatment of Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD), a program aiming to address this genetic disorder.

news.headline: FiscalNote to divest non-core assets to fuel growth, boost profitability, strengthen balance sheet.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Washington, FiscalNote has revealed a definitive agreement to sell off more non-core assets in a strategic move to support policy-focused expansion and enhance profitability. This decision is aimed at driving growth and increasing the company's financial performance. The specific details regarding the assets being divested and the financial implications of this agreement were not disclosed.

news.headline: Kess Co and VIZ Media announce partnership for Hunter x Hunter board game, "The 287th Exams" with dice-rolling adventure.

Get ready to put your determination to the test with this exciting release.

news.headline: Freightos reports strong Q4 2024 with 25% revenue rise YoY, full year revenue up 17%. Digital freight leadership highlighted.

The full-year revenue also saw a significant rise of 17%. This quarter also marked the 20th consecutive quarter of setting record-breaking transaction numbers. These achievements further solidify Freightos' position as a leader in digital freight services. This update was provided from Barcelona, Spain, on February 24, 2025.

news.headline: Monte Rosa Therapeutics to showcase at TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference.
news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has hit an all-time high of 15%, with over 40 million people currently out of work. The economy has also seen a contraction of 8% in the last quarter, marking the worst downturn since the Great Depression. The government has announced a stimulus package of $2 trillion to help revive the economy and provide relief to those in need. Additionally, analysts predict that it may take several years for the economy to fully recover from the current crisis.

news.headline: FDA greenlights ENTR-601-44 as Entrada Therapeutics reports clinical hold lifted. #FDA #EntradaTherapeutics #ENTR-601-44
Boardwalktech to release Q3 fiscal 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2025. Trading as TSXV: BWLK and OTCQB: BWLKF.

news.headline: Apollo Silver Corp appoints Jackie Przybylowski to its Board, while Collette Brown-Rodriguez transitions to advisory role.

("Apollo Silver" or "the Company") (TSX.V:APGO, OTCQB:APGOF, Frankfurt:6ZF0) announced the addition of Jackie Przybylowski to its Board of Directors. This appointment is effective immediately. Concurrently, Ms. Collette Brown-Rodriguez has resigned from the Board and will move into an advisory position within the Company.

news.headline: Siyata Mobile announces distribution agreement with IP Access International, further expanding reach of PoC devices.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 24, 2025, Siyata Mobile Inc. (Nasdaq: SYTA), a leading provider of Push-to-Talk over Cellular ("PoC") devices and cellular signal booster systems, revealed a recent distribution deal with IP Access International. This agreement marks a significant milestone in Siyata's global expansion strategy and will further enhance the Company's reach in the market. Through this partnership, Siyata aims to capitalize on IP Access International's extensive network and customer base to drive sales and increase market penetration. This collaboration signifies a promising opportunity for Siyata, as it continues to establish itself as a key player in the telecommunications industry.

news.headline: Nektar and TrialNet to evaluate Rezpegaldesleukin in Type 1 Diabetes Mellitus through Phase 2 trial.
news.summary: Nektar Therapeutics (Nasdaq: NKTR) and TrialNet are collaborating to conduct a Phase 2 randomized, placebo-controlled clinical study in SAN FRANCISCO and NEW YORK. The study, announced on Feb. 24, 2025, is a significant step in diabetes research. TrialNet, a leading international clinical trial network, will be spearheading the study. This collaboration underscores the commitment to advancing the field of diabetes research and signifies a crucial development in the effort to discover innovative treatment options. The study will involve a total of [specific number] participants and aims to provide valuable insights into diabetes management.

news.headline: Orca Energy Group Inc. prepay IFC loan, settle gas sales agreement, and win Tanzanian court judgment.
news.summary: Orca recently disclosed the early repayment of a loan from the International Finance Corporation. Additionally, they finalized a separate agreement for supplementary gas sales. This comes amidst the resolution of a legal dispute, with the Tanzanian High Court ruling in the company's favor. These developments highlight Orca's financial stability and operational success. This multi-faceted update signifies the prepayment of a significant loan, a new sales agreement, and a favorable legal outcome in Tanzania.

news.headline: Study by Breakthrough shows 97% of shippers have made sustainability progress; cost efficiency top priority in 2025.
news.summary: In Green Bay, Wisconsin, Breakthrough, a prominent sustainable fuel and freight solutions provider, unveiled its third State of Transportation report. According to the study, cost efficiencies emerge as the primary focus for shippers and carriers in 2025, amid emerging economic and governmental challenges before an anticipated market shift. The report shows significant sustainability advancements in the transportation sector, with 97% of shippers progressing towards this goal in the past year.

news.headline: BioCryst's ORLADEYO net revenue was $124.2M in Q4 2024 (+36.6% y-o-y) and $437.7M in FY 2024 (+34.3% y-o-y).
news.summary: In Q4 of 2024, ORLADEYO reported a net revenue of $124.2 million, showing a 36.6% increase year-over-year. For the full year of 2024, the net revenue amounted to $437.7 million, indicating a 34.3% rise compared to the previous year.

news.headline: SysAid partners with Lansweeper for advanced ITAM integration, enhancing AI-driven solutions.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in Toronto, SysAid, a leading global provider of AI-powered IT service management solutions, revealed its exciting partnership with Lansweeper, a prominent company specializing in IT Asset Management 2.0 solutions. This collaboration will bring together SysAid's cutting-edge ITSM platform with Lansweeper's innovative asset management technology, providing users with comprehensive and efficient IT solutions. This integration is set to enhance IT management practices, benefiting multiple organizations worldwide.

news.headline: Nektar Therapeutics to hold virtual event with Type 1 Diabetes experts on Feb 24 at 3:00 p.m. EST. NKTR stock on Nasdaq.
news.summary: Nektar Therapeutics, listed on Nasdaq as NKTR, will conduct a virtual event with Type 1 Diabetes (T1D) Experts on February 24, 2025, starting at 3:00 p.m. EST / 12:00 p.m. PST. The company's Chief Research & Development Officer will be present at the event.

news.headline: 4Patriots offers $10,000 reward to catch thieves who stole 112 solar generators in train robbery near Atlanta.
news.summary: A major emergency preparedness provider based in Nashville is offering a reward of $10,000 for details that can lead to the capture of criminals responsible for stealing over 100 of their new solar power generators. The theft took place in an audacious robbery reminiscent of the Wild West, from a railway car near Atlanta. The company, 4Patriots, is eager to retrieve the 112 units of their latest model, the Patriot Power Generator 1200, which were taken on Jan. 31. In addition to the cash reward, 4Patriots is also offering a complimentary solar generator to those aiding in the recovery effort.

news.headline: Allegro MicroSystems appoints Mike Doogue as President and CEO, effective February 24, 2025. Globally, a leader in power and sensing semiconductor solutions.
news.summary: Allegro MicroSystems, Inc., a prominent player in power and sensing semiconductor solutions for motion control and energy-efficient systems, based in Manchester, New Hampshire, disclosed the selection of Mike Doogue as its new President and Chief Executive Officer on February 24, 2025. Doogue will also serve as a board member of the company. Allegro, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ALGM, operates globally and is recognized for its advanced technological contributions in the industry.

news.headline: Signia releases Pure Charge&Go BCT IX hearing aids with 36-hour battery life, smallest size, and Bluetooth® Classic connectivity.
news.summary: The latest Pure Charge&Go BCT IX hearing aids have been released, offering a remarkable 36 hours of battery life, making it the longest-lasting Bluetooth® Classic hearing aid available. This model is also the most compact Bluetooth® Classic hearing aid currently on the market. The Pure Charge&Go BCT IX sets a new standard for battery life in Bluetooth® Classic technology.

news.headline: Laser Photonics Corp receives second Navy order for MF-1020 cleaning system through distributor ISL. (WIRE)
news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation, a prominent industrial laser systems developer, along with sister company Fonon Technologies, recently disclosed securing a new order for their DefenseTech MRLS Portable Finishing Laser (MF-1020) handheld cleaning system. This marks the second order received by the company. The order was procured via their distribution partner, Incredible Supply & Logistics. Laser Photonics Corporation is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol LASE.

news.headline: Nouveau Monde Graphite to present at BMO Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals Conference, showcasing ore-to-anode Phase 2. #NMG
news.summary: Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc. (NYSE: NMG, TSX: NOU) leadership is currently attending BMO's 34th Global Metals, Mining, and Critical Minerals Conference in Hollywood, Florida. The company's ore-to-active-anode-material Phase 2, including the Matawinie Mine and Bécancour Battery Material Plant, plays a crucial role in North America's efforts to bring back the production of critical minerals. The event aims to position NMG's integrated graphite operation effectively in the capital markets.
